response.original_title: The History of Videograf Productions Volume Three
response.overview: Featuring The1988 Bum Rush Tour From Los Angles to San Fransico Featuring Risk, Charlie, Dream R.I.P., King157, Dare, Rasta. Plus Los Angels Writers Just AWR, Tyke AWR, Haze AWR, Slick, Hex, Green, Risk, Power, Frame, Dream from Los Angels, Charlie, Plus highlights from The 1994 Los Angels graffiti conviction. Plus plenty of never before seen footage
response.title: The History of Videograf Productions Volume Three
